programs.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programs.desc: A legendary comic from the good old days of Las Vegas is set to reunite with his partner on stage for one night only, until one half of the famous duo is found dead.

programs.title: Accident, Suicide, Or Murder
programs.desc: Explore the unbelievable true stories of suspicious deaths, unpacking the evidence and strange behaviour that led investigators to question these tragic events.

programs.title: New Amsterdam
programs.desc: When an elder care facilitate shuts down, New Amsterdam is forced to intake many new patients.

programs.title: Emmerdale
programs.desc: Long-running soap following the ups and downs of village life amid the rolling scenery of the Yorkshire Dales.

programs.title: Infomercial
programs.desc: TVNZ 2 is a New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by state-owned broadcaster TVNZ, known for a broad range of programming including drama, comedy, reality TV, and entertainment. The channel targets a younger demographic with a focus on popular international and local content.
